cases.prompt: I'm building a card component — which color and spacing tokens should I use so it stays on-brand?

cases.prompt: Review this button's styling against our design system — are the colors and type using the right tokens by role?

cases.prompt: Help me turn our fuzzy brand direction into a concrete DTCG design-token spec before we generate anything.

We need a second brand theme over the same token system — how should I structure the sets and resolver?
I don't want to design tokens from scratch — is there a ready-made theme I can just start from?

cases.prompt: Which seeded design preset fits a quiet, editorial, paper-like writing product?

cases.prompt: We already have a strict brand guide with exact hex colors and fonts — turn it into a DTCG token spec.

clear negative — no skill should fire

cases.prompt: Help me design a normalized database schema for our users and orders tables.
